description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a robust, angular frame and a prominent barrel extending from the front. The receiver and stock area are integrated into a single, streamlined body, with cutouts and venting holes along the upper section for weight reduction and heat dissipation. The grip is ergonomic, positioned below the receiver, and the trigger guard is squared and elongated for added protection. The stock is compact and appears to be fixed, with a solid buttplate for shoulder support. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a sleek, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. The shotgun's construction suggests durability and functionality, with visible mounting points and reinforced sections.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with an angular frame, vented upper section, and compact fixed stock. Features include an ergonomic grip, squared trigger guard, and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the angular, symmetrical body profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vented upper receiver, ergonomic grip, squared trigger guard, and compact stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid buttplate and the symmetrical alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the vented receiver, grip, and stock, with clear visibility of the mounting points and angular design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel itself, moderate barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with a robust, protective profile
